notes: Lightweight provider-health tracker for operational routing decisions.
Update this when a provider/model fails, recovers, or is intentionally reconfigured.
Use this as an evidence log; do not assume availability without a successful test.

openai-codex/gpt-5.4.lastError: API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
notes: OAuth-backed OpenAI path is valid, but currently rate-limited.
When cooldown expires, allow one retry and extend cooldown if it fails again immediately.

openai/gpt-5.2.lastError: No API key found for provider "openai". You are authenticated with OpenAI Codex OAuth.
notes: Do not use openai/* API-key models unless an OpenAI API key is intentionally configured.
Current auth mode is OpenAI Codex OAuth, so openai-codex/* is the compatible path.
Configured in OpenClaw, but current local Ollama endpoint does not recognize this model.
Treat Ollama Cloud as unavailable until a real success is observed.
May be slow, but it is the current likely low-cost working option.
